hero_headline: Founding Forward Deployed Engineer is my exact archetype. I built this page 8 minutes after the role posted.
hero_subline: Glean turns enterprise knowledge into agents that do real work. Founding FDE is consulting-grade client embedding plus 0-to-1 building, which is the pair I already run.
pitch_oneliner: Week 1: shadow one strategic customer's C-suite pod, find the highest-value unsolved workflow, and ship a 0-to-1 agent on Glean's graph that does the task, with an eval the customer's own engineers can own.

jd_match.requirement: Founding member operating with the autonomy and accountability of a founder
jd_match.proof: I run empresaAI solo: a 7-agent autonomous system in 24/7 production, owned end to end over a file-based bus with deterministic state.

jd_match.requirement: 0-to-1 product creation: find the biggest unsolved problems at strategic customers and build new products
jd_match.proof: Eurofirms (TOP-3 EU staffing): I built an LLM recruitment system from scratch and put it in the hands of 500+ recruiters.

jd_match.requirement: Work in a pod directly with the C-suite of the world's most influential companies
jd_match.proof: Senior Consultant at Capgemini Invent: I translate executive business cases into shipped engineering delivery for large organizations weekly.

jd_match.requirement: Ship agentic capabilities with the craft required for enterprise trust
jd_match.proof: ManoloBot ships and deploys one Next.js app per day in public, with guardrails and graceful degradation when a dependency fails.
